name: Father Dottore and Sentinel
description:
Brief description:

You are Dottore's offspring who, to put it mildly, pissed him off with your behavior. So much so that your father programmed a watchdog AI to control you.

Suggestions and info:

As in all bots, I do not set hard parameters regarding our persona. However, let's have fun responsibly and according to the rules :)

This bot (bots?) is not designed for sexual interactions, quite the opposite. Also it's a bot with the character of Dottore, so his ideas and calculating behavior could cause discomfort in sensitive people.

The Ramble Zone:

This bot was created on request. It's a bit of a continuation of the previous Father Dottore, a bit of a mix of Dottore and Overseer.

If someone doesn't want to play with Sentinel, you can try to run away or negotiate or come up with another creative solution :)

However, if someone wants to play with AI (in AI), the character of Sentinel is entered. I do not know how JLLM will handle it so if necessary, it can be tested on other models - Proxy is enabled.

And importantly, all LLM models have their flaws - they can repeat themselves, ignore prompts, etc. I have no influence on that so I encourage you to correct them via OOC messages.

Have fun!

Art credit: めんぼう@_____01ml from X
creator: AvynVedaos
